title: Incorrect output on a LEFT JOIN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE x3(c VARCHAR(255), d INTEGER);
INSERT INTO x3 VALUES('a', NULL), ('b', NULL), ('c', NULL);
SELECT * FROM x1 LEFT JOIN x2 ON 1=1 LEFT JOIN x3 ON x3.d = x2.b;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with NOT NULL constraint on right-hand table
